options.formula:
IF(
  {fldqcd5Zrp9leXj1Q} = BLANK(),
    "Insert Work Date",
    IF(
      {fldkgc5pJxrSRyP77},
        "Paid",
        IF(
          IS_AFTER({fldqcd5Zrp9leXj1Q}, TODAY()),
            DATETIME_DIFF({fldqcd5Zrp9leXj1Q}, TODAY(), 'days') & " days to Work Day",
            IF(
              {fldlPNLsVZp6c93dl} = BLANK(),
                "Submit Invoice",
                IF(
                  IS_BEFORE(DATEADD({fldlPNLsVZp6c93dl}, {fldpqUG13Z8s24vvW}, 'days'), TODAY()),
                    "Overdue by " & DATETIME_DIFF(TODAY(), DATEADD({fldlPNLsVZp6c93dl}, {fldpqUG13Z8s24vvW}, 'days'), 'days') & " days",
                    "Submitted"
                )
            )
        )
    )
)

fields.name: Status Box
fields.description: Shows days to Work Date, prompts to submit invoice, marks as submitted, or shows overdue days.

options.formula:
IF(
  {fldqcd5Zrp9leXj1Q},
  IF(
    OR(
      MONTH({fldqcd5Zrp9leXj1Q}) < 4,
      AND(MONTH({fldqcd5Zrp9leXj1Q}) = 4, DAY({fldqcd5Zrp9leXj1Q}) < 6)
    ),
    (YEAR({fldqcd5Zrp9leXj1Q}) - 1) & " - " & YEAR({fldqcd5Zrp9leXj1Q}),
    YEAR({fldqcd5Zrp9leXj1Q}) & " - " & (YEAR({fldqcd5Zrp9leXj1Q}) + 1)
  ),
  BLANK()
)

fields.name: Tax Year Bracket
fields.description: Determines the UK tax year bracket (e.g., '2025 - 2026') for the given Work Date.

fields.name: Invoice ID
fields.description: Shows client invoice ID followed by Invoice Date as DDMMYY if date exists.
